message:
feat(core): add cass index trigger, AllOf event waiting, and event
filter refinements

cass.rs:
- Add trigger_index() method to CassClient for refreshing the cass
  search index after agent sessions complete, making new session
  content searchable for future agents in the swarm learning cycle

event_stream.rs:
- Add AllOf wait condition support to EventWaiter::wait() — tracks
  which sub-conditions have been satisfied and returns when all
  conditions match, enabling composite event gates
- Fix unhandled_only filter: now correctly skips non-detection events
  rather than filtering them out (only PatternDetected events can
  have handled/unhandled state)
- Add run_async_test helper for event stream tests
- Add tests: unhandled_only_filter_only_matches_live_detections,
  event_waiter_all_of_waits_for_each_condition

resize_scheduler.rs:
- Minor formatting/style adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
